name: io.github.yzonur/sap-adt-mcp
description: Give Claude live access to SAP ABAP via ADT: read, search, check, test, and edit objects.

environmentVariables.name: SAP_ADT_MCP_CONFIG
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to your config.json (host/client/user/password per SAP system). Defaults to ~/.sap-adt-mcp/config.json. See config.example.json in the repo.
